title: HSIGMA Live Hologram Bundle
docs_gate_detail: Trading Bot/credentials.json and Trading Bot/token.json are still missing.

layer_families.title: Metro layer
layer_families.description: Discrete transfer-optimized routing graph preserving station identity and interchange load.

layer_families.title: Mycelium layer
layer_families.description: Branching adaptive diffusion graph preserving branching pressure and filament continuity.

layer_families.title: Neural layer
layer_families.description: Convergence/divergence associative graph preserving recurrence and cross-link density.

layer_families.title: Zero layer
layer_families.description: Collapse and normalization pole preserving sink behavior, reset behavior, and route simplification.

layer_families.title: Liminal layer
layer_families.description: Phase-shift and uncertainty layer preserving ambiguity without erasing structure.

layer_families.title: Aether layer
layer_families.description: Expansion and lift pole preserving reopening, re-expansion, and possibility inflation.

layer_families.title: Tunnel layer
layer_families.description: Nonlocal bypass layer preserving entrance and exit identity plus shortcut legality.

layer_families.title: Bridge / return / hinge layer
layer_families.description: Linkage layer for transfer, return, folding, and structural reattachment.

layer_families.title: Dimensional layer
layer_families.description: Lift, crossing, non-planar projection, and manifold transit layer.

layer_families.title: Replay / witness / proof layer
layer_families.description: Evidentiary route layer preserving recurrence, replay, witness, and proof closure.

layer_families.title: Seed / crystal / regeneration layer
layer_families.description: Compression and reseeding layer preserving regeneration anchors and save-state survivability.

dimensional_strata.title: Planar routing stratum
dimensional_strata.description: Metro, mycelium, and neural surface-level navigation.

dimensional_strata.title: Hinge / liminal stratum
dimensional_strata.description: Transfer, phase-shift, bridge approach, and ambiguity mediation.

dimensional_strata.title: Nonlocal transit stratum
dimensional_strata.description: Tunnels, lifts, crossings, and nonlocal bridgework.

dimensional_strata.title: Evidentiary / regenerative stratum
dimensional_strata.description: Replay, witness, proof closure, seed preservation, and regeneration.

hidden_candidates.title: Zero-Aether Mediating Lift Hub
hidden_candidates.structural_need: Repeated entrance/exit asymmetry plus simultaneous zero-collapse and aether-expansion pressure.

hidden_candidates.title: Metro-Mycelium-Neural Composite Transfer Node
hidden_candidates.structural_need: Pairwise transfers do not fully absorb three-family convergence pressure.

hidden_candidates.title: Dimensional Midspan Bridge
hidden_candidates.structural_need: Jumps and crossings imply a lawful intermediate stabilizer.

hidden_candidates.title: Replay / Proof Closure Junction
hidden_candidates.structural_need: Witness-bearing replay without a closure node remains structurally incomplete.

hidden_candidates.title: Seed-Replay Regeneration Coupler
hidden_candidates.structural_need: Seed crystal and replay anchor need a stable bridge for save-state regeneration.

hidden_candidates.title: Frontier Liminal Distributor
hidden_candidates.structural_need: Branching frontier pressure exceeds the capacity of a single liminal hinge abstraction.

deep_root_crosswalk.law: HSIGMA is the current whole-organism visible snapshot above the existing H6 and Seed-6D lane bundles; H6, Seed-6D, and Appendix Q remain evidence-support and convergence surfaces.

frontier_policy: No unsupported latent structure may be promoted into explicit fact. MR and PA remain frontier-explicit. LP remains inferred.

deterministic_regeneration_steps: Add the 2 frontier explicit rows without promoting them.
Restore the 13 route families and 6 tunnel classes.
Reapply route and nexus gate books.
Rerun hidden inference and the fixed-point pass.
Save the stabilized object back to HSIGMA_STAR.
